title: Checkout: Happy Path
clientBrief: Bramble & Co. is deploying a new checkout flow next Friday. The storefront team needs automated regression coverage for a complete guest purchase before the deploy window opens. You are the QA automation engineer on this account. Write one Playwright test covering the full happy path from cart to confirmation.
acceptanceCriteria: Given a guest user starts on the Bramble & Co. home page, when they add the Terracotta Planter to their cart, then the cart nav link should reflect an updated item count.
Given a guest user with items in their cart, when they proceed to checkout, then the checkout form should be visible.

Given a guest user on the checkout page, when they fill in valid contact and shipping details and submit the form, then the Order Confirmed section should become visible and display a six-digit order number.
